title: [H&H] Harmony & Hardcore
description: Fun, Adventures, Magicals, Technologis. Enjoy it!
body:
_An adventure awaits you..._

_But are you prepared for it?_

_Are you ready for the challenges that lie ahead? The terrifying monsters and incredible creatures who are ready to destroy you? Or the hours spent thinking about how your mechanism should be designed? To fly among the stars and explore the deepest depths of the world?_

_Oh, did I scare you? I'm sorry. I didn't mean to do that. Not everything in this world is so bad, because there are not only horrors and trials waiting for you. There are many wonderful and incredible things in this world. If you can survive and adapt, incredible discoveries, amazing landscapes, cute and kind creatures, and fun await you. Most importantly, peace is waiting for you..._

Hi there! I'm z4p0v, and I'm the creator of this modpack. To be honest, creating something like this isn't my strong suit yet, but that's okay! This is my first time trying my hand at it, and I want to keep improving. In this pack, I wanted to include everything for everyone

What have I prepared for you? Let's start:
- Incredible and intimidating for many **Create**
- The vast **Ad Astra**
- Charming **Botania**
- The well-known and well-loved **AE2**
- As well as a large number of mods for **various armors**, a large number of **tools and weapons**, **various aggressive and non-aggressive mobs**, **unique generation of the world**, and many more...

This is my first modpack, which I decided to take seriously. So far it's just a modpack, but now I'm doing a full configuration of configs to make the game more interesting, as well as creating a quest book for this modpack. In the future, a separate ENT is planned, and in the future, a plot for this modpack. Well, I dare not delay any longer, download the modpack and enjoy solo or with friends!
